title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Gurgaon location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
